text:
The volunteer hour
tracker students
actually keep open.
textPreview: The volunteer hour | tracker students | actually keep open.

text:
A privacy-first PWA for logging service hours, hitting goals, and exporting
reports that survive a college application. Built for students, schools, and clubs.
textPreview: A privacy-first PWA for logging service hours, hitting goals, and exporting | reports that survive a college application. Built for stude...

text: A real product, not a mockup.
textPreview: A real product, not a mockup.

text: VolunTrack is already live, already deployed, and already in use. It runs as an installable PWA, ships with a school/admin layer, and exports PDF reports a counselor will actually accept.
textPreview: VolunTrack is already live, already deployed, and already in use. It runs as an installable PWA, ships with a school/admin layer, and exp...

text: Student, supervisor, school admin, district admin, and platform admin. Each gets the right surface — nothing more.
textPreview: Student, supervisor, school admin, district admin, and platform admin. Each gets the right surface — nothing more.

text: Auto-earning achievements turn consistency into something students can see, share, and feel good about.
textPreview: Auto-earning achievements turn consistency into something students can see, share, and feel good about.

text: Installs on iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, and Linux. Works offline after the first visit. No app store gate.
textPreview: Installs on iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, and Linux. Works offline after the first visit. No app store gate.

text: Take the friction out of proving you showed up — and the data lives on the student's own device, not in someone else's system.
textPreview: Take the friction out of proving you showed up — and the data lives on the student's own device, not in someone else's system.

text: Five minutes from service hour to verified record.
textPreview: Five minutes from service hour to verified record.

text: Activity, hours, supervisor, notes — and a photo of proof — in one form.
textPreview: Activity, hours, supervisor, notes — and a photo of proof — in one form.

text: Progress ring, weekly chart, and 12 badges keep momentum visible.
textPreview: Progress ring, weekly chart, and 12 badges keep momentum visible.

text: PDF report, CSV export, or a printable certificate in one click.
textPreview: PDF report, CSV export, or a printable certificate in one click.

text: Optional school dashboard with PIN join, rosters, and PDF review.
textPreview: Optional school dashboard with PIN join, rosters, and PDF review.

text: Data stays in the student's browser. No account server, no data harvesting.
textPreview: Data stays in the student's browser. No account server, no data harvesting.

text: Every step fits on one screen. Every record stays portable. That's the whole product.
textPreview: Every step fits on one screen. Every record stays portable. That's the whole product.

text: Calm UI, dense info, no clutter.
textPreview: Calm UI, dense info, no clutter.

text: Type a sentence — the on-device agent drafts a full log entry. Confirm and you're done.
textPreview: Type a sentence — the on-device agent drafts a full log entry. Confirm and you're done.

text: Daily streak, weekly chart, and a progress ring toward the primary goal.
textPreview: Daily streak, weekly chart, and a progress ring toward the primary goal.

text: Counselor-ready service log and a printable certificate. No locked-in formats.
textPreview: Counselor-ready service log and a printable certificate. No locked-in formats.

text: Log it once, prove it forever.
textPreview: Log it once, prove it forever.

text: 12 badges that turn consistency into something visible
textPreview: 12 badges that turn consistency into something visible

text: PDF report that survives a college application
textPreview: PDF report that survives a college application

text: School PIN join — no manual roster uploads
textPreview: School PIN join — no manual roster uploads

text: Verified supervisor flow with PDF review
textPreview: Verified supervisor flow with PDF review

text: Bulk CSV import + export for counseling
textPreview: Bulk CSV import + export for counseling

text: An AI agent that monitors system health 24/7
textPreview: An AI agent that monitors system health 24/7

text: Privacy isn't a feature. It's the foundation.
textPreview: Privacy isn't a feature. It's the foundation.

text: Counselors and parents ask the same question first. Here's the honest answer.
textPreview: Counselors and parents ask the same question first. Here's the honest answer.

text: Volunteer logs live in the student's browser (localStorage). No cloud, no account, no server talking to volunteer data.
textPreview: Volunteer logs live in the student's browser (localStorage). No cloud, no account, no server talking to volunteer data.

text: The only analytics are Vercel pageviews and speed metrics. There is no event tracking on hours, names, schools, or activity.
textPreview: The only analytics are Vercel pageviews and speed metrics. There is no event tracking on hours, names, schools, or activity.

text: When a school signs up, only then does the server see anything — and only what the student explicitly submits.
textPreview: When a school signs up, only then does the server see anything — and only what the student explicitly submits.

text: Server-side auth uses bcrypt password hashing, JWT tokens, parameterized queries, and request rate limiting. See SECURITY.md.
textPreview: Server-side auth uses bcrypt password hashing, JWT tokens, parameterized queries, and request rate limiting. See SECURITY.md.

text: Every line is on GitHub. Schools can self-host, audit, and extend without vendor lock-in.
textPreview: Every line is on GitHub. Schools can self-host, audit, and extend without vendor lock-in.

text: Forgot your PIN or password? A 6-digit recovery code is emailed — works for both new and returning students.
textPreview: Forgot your PIN or password? A 6-digit recovery code is emailed — works for both new and returning students.

text: Modern, boring, and ready to extend.
textPreview: Modern, boring, and ready to extend.

text: Everything is documented in the repo, runs on free tiers, and survives being handed to a junior dev.
textPreview: Everything is documented in the repo, runs on free tiers, and survives being handed to a junior dev.

text: React 18 · Vite 5 · React Router 6 · Tailwind CSS 3
textPreview: React 18 · Vite 5 · React Router 6 · Tailwind CSS 3

text: PWA via vite-plugin-pwa. No Webpack, no Next.js, no lock-in.
textPreview: PWA via vite-plugin-pwa. No Webpack, no Next.js, no lock-in.

text: localStorage namespaces · React Context · custom hooks
textPreview: localStorage namespaces · React Context · custom hooks

text: Data lives under the voluntrack: namespace — fully exportable, fully portable.
textPreview: Data lives under the voluntrack: namespace — fully exportable, fully portable.

text: Optional. The full app works without it. School features turn it on.
textPreview: Optional. The full app works without it. School features turn it on.

text: Counselor-ready PDF logs, CSV exports, and printable certificates.
textPreview: Counselor-ready PDF logs, CSV exports, and printable certificates.

text: On-device agent for log drafting + system monitoring
textPreview: On-device agent for log drafting + system monitoring

text: Drafts entries from a single sentence. Detects + auto-fixes production incidents.
textPreview: Drafts entries from a single sentence. Detects + auto-fixes production incidents.

text: GitHub Actions · GitHub Pages · Render · Vercel Analytics
textPreview: GitHub Actions · GitHub Pages · Render · Vercel Analytics

text: CI runs lint + build + preview as three jobs. Green commits auto-deploy.
textPreview: CI runs lint + build + preview as three jobs. Green commits auto-deploy.

text: Phases 1 through 3 are live. Phase 4 is on deck.
textPreview: Phases 1 through 3 are live. Phase 4 is on deck.

text: Dashboard, log, calendar, achievements, reports, profile, settings, about, contact, status, admin.
textPreview: Dashboard, log, calendar, achievements, reports, profile, settings, about, contact, status, admin.

text: First Hour, Streak, 10/50/100 Hours, Category Master, Community Hero, etc.
textPreview: First Hour, Streak, 10/50/100 Hours, Category Master, Community Hero, etc.

text: All volunteer data in the browser under the voluntrack: namespace.
textPreview: All volunteer data in the browser under the voluntrack: namespace.

text: The core app is fully usable without ever talking to a server.
textPreview: The core app is fully usable without ever talking to a server.

text: CI: 3 jobs (lint · build · preview) on Node 24
textPreview: CI: 3 jobs (lint · build · preview) on Node 24

text: Free for students. Paid for the orgs that need admin.
textPreview: Free for students. Paid for the orgs that need admin.

text: Every student gets the full app, every badge, every export, no strings.
textPreview: Every student gets the full app, every badge, every export, no strings.

text: Everything in Student, plus the school admin layer. PIN join, rosters, supervisor flow.
textPreview: Everything in Student, plus the school admin layer. PIN join, rosters, supervisor flow.

text: Multi-school rollout, white-glove onboarding, AI system monitoring, and SLA support.
textPreview: Multi-school rollout, white-glove onboarding, AI system monitoring, and SLA support.

text: Maria is a senior at Lincoln High. She needs 100 verified hours to graduate and 75 for her scholarship application.
textPreview: Maria is a senior at Lincoln High. She needs 100 verified hours to graduate and 75 for her scholarship application.

text: She joins VolunTrack with the school PIN and gets a private account on her own device.
textPreview: She joins VolunTrack with the school PIN and gets a private account on her own device.

text: She logs hours at the food bank. The AI agent drafts the entry from a one-sentence description. She confirms.
textPreview: She logs hours at the food bank. The AI agent drafts the entry from a one-sentence description. She confirms.

text: Her supervisor uploads a signed PDF. The school admin verifies it inline. Maria's record updates automatically.
textPreview: Her supervisor uploads a signed PDF. The school admin verifies it inline. Maria's record updates automatically.

text: Counselor exports her full log for the scholarship committee. Done — 12 minutes, end to end.
textPreview: Counselor exports her full log for the scholarship committee. Done — 12 minutes, end to end.

text: average time to log + verify a single session
textPreview: average time to log + verify a single session

text: of her hours are exportable, portable, and provable
textPreview: of her hours are exportable, portable, and provable

text: instead of a backpack full of paper sign-in sheets
textPreview: instead of a backpack full of paper sign-in sheets

text: I built VolunTrack. I can build yours too.
textPreview: I built VolunTrack. I can build yours too.

text: Same stack, same discipline, applied to your product, your school, or your internal tool.
textPreview: Same stack, same discipline, applied to your product, your school, or your internal tool.

text: A full React + Vite + Tailwind PWA, deployed to your domain, branded to you. 3–6 weeks.
textPreview: A full React + Vite + Tailwind PWA, deployed to your domain, branded to you. 3–6 weeks.

text: Auth, payments, dashboards, AI helpers, export pipelines, integrations. Scoped per ticket.
textPreview: Auth, payments, dashboards, AI helpers, export pipelines, integrations. Scoped per ticket.

text: Your branding, your domain, your student data on your Postgres. Source code included.
textPreview: Your branding, your domain, your student data on your Postgres. Source code included.

text: Hosting, monitoring, AI agent ops, feature requests, and on-call. Cancel any month.
textPreview: Hosting, monitoring, AI agent ops, feature requests, and on-call. Cancel any month.

text: Three ways to take the next ten minutes.
textPreview: Three ways to take the next ten minutes.

text: Open the app, sign in with any email + password, and log a single hour. Time it — it's under 90 seconds.
textPreview: Open the app, sign in with any email + password, and log a single hour. Time it — it's under 90 seconds.

text: Everything is on GitHub under MIT. Read SECURITY.md for the auth model, README.md for the stack.
textPreview: Everything is on GitHub under MIT. Read SECURITY.md for the auth model, README.md for the stack.

text: Email is the fastest path. I reply within a business day, and I'm happy to do a 20-minute call before any commitment.
textPreview: Email is the fastest path. I reply within a business day, and I'm happy to do a 20-minute call before any commitment.
